description: The struggle between the federal administration's skepticism and the popular demand for mass vaccination against COVID-19 in Brazil. Despite central opposition, state-led initiatives drove high vaccine uptake.

key_events.description: Presidential rhetoric creates confusion regarding efficacy of Coronavac.
Supreme Court rules that states and municipalities can mandate vaccination.
Expansion of PNI (National Immunization Program) despite lack of federal enthusiasm.
High vaccination rates reached across major urban centers.

calibration_notes: Demonstrates the divergence between institutional rhetoric and bottom-up public demand for health safety.
